info.title: GOAT AI
info.description: Simon Business School Strategic Intelligence API

get.description: Return the list of locally available Ollama model names.

get.summary: Read capabilities for one Ollama model
get.description: Return Ollama-reported capabilities for the selected model.

post.summary: Stream a chat completion over SSE
post.description: Stream an LLM response as Server-Sent Events.

post.summary: Stream upload ingestion events over SSE
post.description: Accept a supported file, ingest it into knowledge storage, and stream readiness metadata.

post.summary: Ingest an uploaded file and return JSON readiness metadata
post.description: Accept a supported knowledge file and return ingestion metadata as JSON.

get.description: Return session metadata rows for the history sidebar.

delete.description: Delete all persisted sessions and related conversation rows.

get.description: Return one full persisted session including all messages.

post.description: Persist a knowledge upload and register document metadata.

get.description: Return metadata for one persisted knowledge upload.

post.description: Start a knowledge ingestion job for one uploaded document.

get.description: Return status for one ingestion attempt.

post.description: Run pure retrieval against indexed knowledge chunks.
Return a retrieval-backed answer with citations.

post.summary: Upload an image for vision chat
post.description: Persist and normalize a PNG/JPEG/WebP image for use with POST /api/chat.

get.description: Return real-time GPU telemetry used by frontend status strip.
Rolling average duration of completed chat streams (milliseconds).
Return config + host probes for optional high-risk features (see docs/ENGINEERING_STANDARDS.md §15).
Return the current runtime target and the ordered deployment fallback list.
Return 200 when SQLite and (unless skipped) Ollama are reachable; 503 otherwise.

503.description: Not ready; see JSON ``checks`` for failing dependency.

get.description: Expose in-process counters and histograms for Prometheus scraping.

post.summary: Execute code in an isolated sandbox
post.description: Execute one durable code sandbox request and persist the result.

503.description: Runtime gate closed or sandbox provider unavailable.

get.summary: Read one persisted code sandbox execution
get.description: Read one visible code sandbox execution record.

503.description: Runtime gate closed or sandbox provider unavailable.

get.summary: Read one code sandbox execution event timeline
get.description: Read the durable event timeline for one visible execution.

503.description: Runtime gate closed or sandbox provider unavailable.

get.summary: Stream one code sandbox execution log timeline
get.description: Stream replayable stdout/stderr chunks and status updates for one execution.

503.description: Runtime gate closed or sandbox provider unavailable.

post.summary: Create and enqueue a durable workbench task
post.description: Create a durable queued workbench task record and enqueue execution.

503.description: Workbench runtime is not available on this deployment.

get.description: List the current caller-visible retrieval sources for workbench tasks.

503.description: Workbench runtime is not available on this deployment.

get.summary: Read one durable workbench task status
get.description: Read the current durable state for one workbench task.

503.description: Workbench runtime is not available on this deployment.

get.summary: Read one durable workbench task event timeline
get.description: Read the current durable event timeline for one workbench task.

503.description: Workbench runtime is not available on this deployment.

ChatArtifact.title: ChatArtifact
ChatArtifact.description: One downloadable file generated during chat.

file_context.title: File Context
file_context.description: True when this user message is upload-derived tabular file context.

image_attachment_ids.title: Image Attachment Ids
image_attachment_ids.description: Optional image attachment ids (vision) associated with this user turn.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A single turn in the conversation (mirrors goat_ai.types.ChatTurn).

knowledge_document_ids.title: Knowledge Document Ids
knowledge_document_ids.description: Optional indexed knowledge documents to use for retrieval-augmented answering.

image_attachment_ids.title: Image Attachment Ids
image_attachment_ids.description: Optional uploaded image attachments for the current turn (last user message).

system_instruction.title: System Instruction
system_instruction.description: Optional user instructions merged after the base system prompt.

think.title: Think
think.description: Ollama thinking mode toggle or effort level; true enables Thinking, false disables it, and low/medium/high request an effort level.

plan_mode.title: Plan Mode
plan_mode.description: When true, the system prompt asks the model to plan before answering.

theme_style.title: Theme Style
theme_style.description: Appearance theme style used to select the default assistant persona when no explicit system prompt override is configured.

execution_mode.title: Execution Mode
execution_mode.description: Execution mode. Phase 18A supports synchronous and in-process async runs.

runtime_preset.title: Runtime Preset
runtime_preset.description: Execution preset. Phase 18 supports a shell workspace only.

code.title: Code
code.description: Shell script source. When command is omitted, the server executes this script.

command.title: Command
command.description: Optional shell command executed inside the workspace.

stdin.title: Stdin
stdin.description: Optional UTF-8 stdin content redirected into the entry command.

timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec
timeout_sec.description: Optional execution timeout override, capped by server policy.

network_policy.title: Network Policy
network_policy.description: Reserved for future policies. Phase 18 only allows `disabled`.

files.title: Files
files.description: Optional inline text files seeded into the temporary workspace.

CodeSandboxExecRequest.title: CodeSandboxExecRequest
CodeSandboxExecRequest.description: Request body for one code sandbox execution.

CodeSandboxExecutionResponse.title: CodeSandboxExecutionResponse
CodeSandboxExecutionResponse.description: Durable read model for one code sandbox execution.

policy_allowed.title: Policy Allowed
policy_allowed.description: Caller-scoped policy gate derived from credential scopes.

allowed_by_config.title: Allowed By Config
allowed_by_config.description: Operator enabled the feature in deployment config.

available_on_host.title: Available On Host
available_on_host.description: Probed runtime dependency (e.g. Docker) appears usable.

provider_name.title: Provider Name
provider_name.description: Selected runtime provider for code sandbox execution.

isolation_level.title: Isolation Level
isolation_level.description: Isolation tier for the active provider: container or host.

network_policy_enforced.title: Network Policy Enforced
network_policy_enforced.description: Whether the selected provider can actually enforce the declared network policy.

deny_reason.title: Deny Reason
deny_reason.description: Controlled enum for runtime gate only; never raw exception text.

CodeSandboxFeaturePayload.title: CodeSandboxFeaturePayload
CodeSandboxFeaturePayload.description:
Runtime / dependency readiness for the code sandbox (§15).

``policy_allowed`` is evaluated from the current request's authorization context.
Runtime availability remains separate and must not be conflated with policy denial.

filename.title: Filename
filename.description: Relative workspace path for the seeded file.

content.title: Content
content.description: UTF-8 text content written into the workspace.

CodeSandboxInlineFile.title: CodeSandboxInlineFile
CodeSandboxInlineFile.description: One inline text file seeded into the ephemeral sandbox workspace.

path.title: Path
path.description: Relative path under `outputs/` in the workspace.

CodeSandboxOutputFilePayload.title: CodeSandboxOutputFilePayload
CodeSandboxOutputFilePayload.description: Metadata for one output file created under the sandbox outputs directory.

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Human-readable message or structured validation errors.

request_id.title: Request Id
request_id.description: Echo of X-Request-ID when the server generated or accepted one.

GPUStatusResponse.title: GPUStatusResponse
GPUStatusResponse.description: GPU telemetry payload used by sidebar status strip.

HistorySessionFileContext.title: HistorySessionFileContext
HistorySessionFileContext.description: Normalized stored file-context metadata for one session.

HistorySessionKnowledgeDocument.title: HistorySessionKnowledgeDocument
HistorySessionKnowledgeDocument.description: Indexed knowledge document attached to a chat session.

image_attachment_ids.title: Image Attachment Ids
image_attachment_ids.description: Vision image attachment ids stored for this user turn.

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.description: Downloadable generated files associated with this assistant turn.

HistorySessionMessage.title: HistorySessionMessage
HistorySessionMessage.description: Stored message row for persisted session history.

HistorySessionSummary.title: HistorySessionSummary
HistorySessionSummary.description: Lightweight session metadata for sidebar/history list views.

InferenceLatencyResponse.title: InferenceLatencyResponse
InferenceLatencyResponse.description: Rolling average chat completion time (server-side, in-process).

KnowledgeCitation.title: KnowledgeCitation
KnowledgeCitation.description: Citation payload returned from knowledge retrieval.

document_id.title: Document Id
document_id.description: Document to ingest into the knowledge index.

force_reindex.title: Force Reindex
force_reindex.description: Rebuild index artifacts even if one already exists.

KnowledgeIngestionRequest.title: KnowledgeIngestionRequest
KnowledgeIngestionRequest.description: Contract-first request body for knowledge ingestion.

error_code.title: Error Code
error_code.description: Stable machine-readable failure code when status=failed.

error_detail.title: Error Detail
error_detail.description: Sanitized human-readable failure reason when status=failed.

KnowledgeIngestionStatusResponse.title: KnowledgeIngestionStatusResponse
KnowledgeIngestionStatusResponse.description: Lifecycle/status view for one ingestion attempt.

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: Maximum number of ranked hits to return.

effective_query.title: Effective Query
effective_query.description: When query rewrite is active, the normalized string used for retrieval.

byte_size.title: Byte Size
byte_size.description: Raw uploaded file size in bytes.

KnowledgeUploadResponse.title: KnowledgeUploadResponse
KnowledgeUploadResponse.description: Contract skeleton for a persisted knowledge upload.

KnowledgeUploadStatusResponse.title: KnowledgeUploadStatusResponse
KnowledgeUploadStatusResponse.description: Lookup response for one persisted knowledge upload.

context_length.title: Context Length
context_length.description: Ollama-reported context window in tokens, when discoverable from /api/show.

allowed_by_config.title: Allowed By Config
allowed_by_config.description: Operator enabled the feature family in deployment config.

available_on_host.title: Available On Host
available_on_host.description: Required runtime dependencies and executors are available.

effective_enabled.title: Effective Enabled
effective_enabled.description: Both config and runtime are ready.

deny_reason.title: Deny Reason
deny_reason.description: Controlled enum for runtime gate only; never raw exception text.

RuntimeFeaturePayload.title: RuntimeFeaturePayload
RuntimeFeaturePayload.description: Runtime / dependency readiness for optional non-policy-gated features.

RuntimeTargetItemResponse.title: RuntimeTargetItemResponse
RuntimeTargetItemResponse.description: One runtime target candidate in deployment preference order.

RuntimeTargetResponse.title: RuntimeTargetResponse
RuntimeTargetResponse.description: Resolved runtime target metadata used by deploy/ops tooling.

SystemFeaturesResponse.title: SystemFeaturesResponse
SystemFeaturesResponse.description: Public feature flags derived from config + host probes.

suffix_prompt.title: Suffix Prompt
suffix_prompt.description: Immediate prompt suggestion derived from the uploaded file suffix.

retrieval_mode.title: Retrieval Mode
retrieval_mode.description: Stable marker indicating the upload now routes through the RAG knowledge pipeline.

template_prompt.title: Template Prompt
template_prompt.description: Content-aware template prompt recommended after RAG analysis of the uploaded file.

chart.title: Chart
chart.description: Reserved for backward compatibility; charts are now created only during chat tool calls.

WorkbenchFeaturePayload.title: WorkbenchFeaturePayload
WorkbenchFeaturePayload.description: Capability inventory for future agent/workbench surfaces.

source_id.title: Source Id
source_id.description: Stable source identifier used by tasks.

scope_kind.title: Scope Kind
scope_kind.description: Whether the source is global, document-scoped, or connector-bound.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Declared retrieval capabilities such as search, fetch, and citations.

task_kinds.title: Task Kinds
task_kinds.description: Workbench task kinds that may eventually use this source.

read_only.title: Read Only
read_only.description: Whether the source is read-only from the model/runtime perspective.

runtime_ready.title: Runtime Ready
runtime_ready.description: Whether the source can be used by the current backend runtime today.

deny_reason.title: Deny Reason
deny_reason.description: Stable deny reason when the source exists but is not runtime-ready.

WorkbenchSourcePayload.title: WorkbenchSourcePayload
WorkbenchSourcePayload.description: Declarative retrieval source entry for future workbench tasks.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Sources the current caller can see for workbench retrieval tasks.

WorkbenchSourcesResponse.title: WorkbenchSourcesResponse
WorkbenchSourcesResponse.description: Visible retrieval source inventory for the current caller.

task_kind.title: Task Kind
task_kind.description: Task surface requested by the client.

WorkbenchTaskAcceptedResponse.title: WorkbenchTaskAcceptedResponse
WorkbenchTaskAcceptedResponse.description: Minimal accepted-task payload returned when a workbench task is created.

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: Stable event name for this task lifecycle update.

status.title: Status
status.description: Optional task lifecycle status associated with this event.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional structured metadata for clients that need richer polling.

WorkbenchTaskEventPayload.title: WorkbenchTaskEventPayload
WorkbenchTaskEventPayload.description: One durable event emitted during task execution.

events.title: Events
events.description: Ordered durable events for this task.

WorkbenchTaskEventsResponse.title: WorkbenchTaskEventsResponse
WorkbenchTaskEventsResponse.description: Durable event timeline returned when polling workbench task progress.

task_kind.title: Task Kind
task_kind.description: Planned task surface requested by the client.

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: Optional chat/session affinity for future task replay.

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Optional project/memory scope for future project workspaces.

knowledge_document_ids.title: Knowledge Document Ids
knowledge_document_ids.description: Optional attached knowledge documents for retrieval-aware tasks.

source_ids.title: Source Ids
source_ids.description: Optional retrieval source ids for browse, research, or plan context.

connector_ids.title: Connector Ids
connector_ids.description: Deprecated alias for source_ids. Prefer source_ids for new clients.

WorkbenchTaskRequest.title: WorkbenchTaskRequest
WorkbenchTaskRequest.description: Request body for durable long-running workbench tasks.

format.title: Format
format.description: Serialization format for the returned result content.

citations.title: Citations
citations.description: Optional citations gathered during browse/research retrieval.

WorkbenchTaskResultPayload.title: WorkbenchTaskResultPayload
WorkbenchTaskResultPayload.description: Minimal inline result shape for a completed workbench task.

task_kind.title: Task Kind
task_kind.description: Task surface requested by the client.

result.description: Optional completed task result. Current runtime guarantees markdown for plan tasks and may include citations for browse or deep_research tasks when retrieval succeeds.

workspace_outputs.title: Workspace Outputs
workspace_outputs.description: Optional durable workspace outputs linked to this task. Canvas documents are the first output kind in this runtime slice.

WorkbenchTaskStatusResponse.title: WorkbenchTaskStatusResponse
WorkbenchTaskStatusResponse.description: Status payload returned when polling a durable workbench task.

content_format.title: Content Format
content_format.description: Serialization format used by the stored content payload.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Optional structured metadata for richer future workbench UIs.

WorkbenchWorkspaceOutputPayload.title: WorkbenchWorkspaceOutputPayload
WorkbenchWorkspaceOutputPayload.description: Typed durable output linked to one workbench task.

tags.name: models
tags.description: Model discovery endpoints for Ollama-backed chat.

tags.name: upload
tags.description: Tabular file analysis endpoints for CSV/XLSX uploads.

tags.name: history
tags.description: Persisted chat session listing and retrieval.

tags.name: knowledge
tags.description: Contract-first knowledge ingestion and retrieval endpoints.
